description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a hip roof and a light-colored exterior, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with hedges and a large tree in the backyard. The front facade features symmetrical windows with shutters and a central entryway flanked by two small bushes. A driveway leads to a single-car garage attached to the side of the house, partially covered by a carport. The backyard is enclosed and includes a paved area and mature greenery, providing privacy and shade. The house sits on a rectangular lot with a concrete walkway leading to the front door. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of mid-20th-century American residential architecture.
description: A two-story, light-colored suburban house with a hip roof, attached garage, and fenced yard featuring hedges and a large backyard tree. The facade is symmetrical with shuttered windows and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows with shutters, driveway, garage, and front hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, carport, and a portion of the backyard with visible fencing and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large tree, paved area, and the back of the garage and house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows, fencing, and the expanse of the backyard greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small steps, flanked by bushes, and a simple overhang; no porch or columns.
